---
title: "setup"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-16"
---
```{r}
# set up files. 
WKDir ="/Users/z5161362/OneDrive - DPIE/Documents/PhD/spatRast/"

library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(galah)
library(terra)
library(raster)
library(tictoc)

galah_config(email = "jordanmirandamay@gmail.com", atlas = "Australia")
source(paste0(WKDir,"R/functions.R"))

source(paste0(WKDir,"R/cost_distance.r"))

library(APCalign)

library(ggplot2)
library(tidyterra)
library(ggnewscale)
library(ggrepel)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r}
# This is National parks official park boundaries
np <- read_sf(dsn = paste0(WKDir,"data_wol/tenure_npws_estateinternalboundaries/NPWS_EstateInternalBoundaries.shp"))
np_bmk <- subset(np, NAME %in% c("Blue Mountains National Park", "Kanangra-Boyd National Park")) #subset out Blue Mountains and Kanangra NP from other parks
np_bmk_bound <- st_make_valid(np_bmk) #fixing broken shapes
np_bmk <- st_union(np_bmk_bound) #tuning into one sf 
np_bmk <- st_transform(np_bmk, 4326)
np_bmk_buff <- st_buffer(np_bmk, dist = 2000, nQuadSegs = 30) # changed from 500 to 2000
np_bmk_buff <- st_sfc(st_polygon(list(np_bmk_buff[[1]][[1]])), crs = st_crs(np_bmk_buff))
plot(np_bmk_buff)
```

```{r}
# This is a shape from qgis.This is used for downloading occurrence records.
bmk_bound <- read_sf(dsn = paste0(WKDir,"data_bmk/bounds/bound_bmk_v1.shp")) 
#plot(bmk_bound)
```

```{r}
#This is tracks from open street maps
bmk <- read_sf(dsn = paste0(WKDir,"data_bmk/tracks/tracks_bmk_v3.shp"))
#plot(bmk$geometry)

bmk_tr <- st_intersection(bmk,np_bmk_buff)

bmk_tr <- bmk_tr[!bmk_tr$highway %in% c("proposed", "construction"), ]
bmk_tr$highway_com <- bmk_tr$highway

bmk_tr <- bmk_tr %>%
  mutate(highway_com = case_when(
    highway %in% c("trunk","primary","primary_link", "secondary", "secondary_link", "tertiary","tertiary_link","motorway", "motorway_link") ~ "road",
    highway %in% c("residential", "unclassified", "service", "escape", "trunk_link","pedestrian", "living_street","cycleway", "busway","corridor","services") ~ "access track",
    highway %in% c("track") ~ "track",
    highway %in% c("footway", "steps", "path", "scramble") ~ "path")
    )
```

```{r}
# Getting occurrences records
occ_bmk_inat_all <- galah_call() |>
  galah_identify("Plantae") |>
  geolocate(bmk_bound) |>
  galah_filter(
    dataResourceName == "iNaturalist Australia",
    imageIDsCount >=1
  ) |>
  galah_select(institutionID, informationWithheld, raw_informationWithheld,occurrenceID,coordinateUncertaintyInMeters, group = "basic") |>
  atlas_occurrences()

occ_bmk_inat <- occ_bmk_inat_all %>% filter(is.na(raw_informationWithheld))

#turning occurrences records into shape file for compatibility
occ_bmk_sp <- galah_record_to_sf (occ_bmk_inat)
#filtering to match national park shapefile
occ_bmk <- st_filter(occ_bmk_sp, np_bmk)
```

```{r}
# Getting occurrences records
occ_bmk_herb_all <- galah_call() |>
  galah_identify("Plantae") |>
  geolocate(bmk_bound) |>
  galah_filter(
    basisOfRecord == "PRESERVED_SPECIMEN",
    imageIDsCount >=1,
    year >= 2010
  ) |>
  galah_select(institutionID, informationWithheld, raw_informationWithheld,occurrenceID,coordinateUncertaintyInMeters, verbatimLatitude, verbatimLongitude, group = "basic")  |>
atlas_occurrences()

occ_bmk_herb <- occ_bmk_herb_all %>% filter(!is.na(eventDate))

#turning occurrences records into shape file for compatibility
occ_bmk_herb_sp <- galah_record_to_sf (occ_bmk_herb)
#filtering to match national park shapefile
occ_bmk_herb <- st_filter(occ_bmk_herb_sp, np_bmk)
```


```{r}
#This section just runs once. It takes the DEM and saves a slope rater than can be loaded in, in the next section.
#only run once, takes a long time and is memory intensive.
file = "D:/NSW Government - Spatial Services/DEM/2 Metre/"
filename =list.files(path=file, pattern = ".tif", full.names = FALSE, recursive = FALSE)
one <- terra::rast(paste0(file, filename[1]))
set_crs <- crs(one)


rasters_2 <- lapply(filename, function(fn) terra::rast(paste0(file, fn)))
merged_2  <- do.call(mosaic, c(rasters_2, fun=mean))




file = "D:/NSW Government - Spatial Services/DEM/1 Metre/"
filename =list.files(path=file, pattern = ".tif", full.names = FALSE, recursive = FALSE)
rasters_1 <- lapply(filename, function(fn) terra::rast(paste0( file, fn)))
merged_1  <- do.call(mosaic, c(rasters_1, fun=mean))
ras_1 <- terra::aggregate(merged_1, fact = 2, fun = mean)

stiched <- terra::merge(ras_1, merged_2)
terra::writeRaster(stiched, paste0(WKDir, "data_bmk/DEM/stiched.tif"), overwrite = TRUE)
#rm(ras_1, merged_2)

np_bmk_buff_gda94 <- sf::st_transform(np_bmk_buff, crs = crs(stiched))
stiched_bmk <- terra::crop(stiched, vect(np_bmk_buff_gda94), mask=TRUE)
slope <- terra::terrain(stiched_bmk, v="slope", unit="degrees", neighbors=8)
#terra::writeRaster(slope, paste0(WKDir, "data_bmk/DEM/slope.tif"), overwrite = TRUE) ## Commented out to prevent re-writing

slope <- terra::rast(paste0(WKDir, "data_bmk/DEM/slope.tif")) # slope from Elvis DEM tiles
slope_bmk_save <- terra::crop(slope, vect(np_bmk_buff_gda94), mask=TRUE) # This line takes a while. Try and keep loaded
terra::writeRaster(slope_bmk_save, paste0(WKDir, "data_bmk/DEM/slope_bmk.tif"), overwrite = TRUE) ## Commented out to prevent re-writing
#rm(stiched, slope_bmk_save)


```



```{r}
slope_bmk <- terra::rast(paste0(WKDir, "data_bmk/DEM/slope_bmk.tif")) # slope from Elvis DEM tiles

# Transfering data to DEM CRS = 4283
np_bmk_gda94 <- st_transform(np_bmk, crs = crs(set_crs)) # Outline
np_bmk_buff_gda94 <- st_transform(np_bmk_buff, crs = crs(set_crs)) # Buffer
bmk_tr_gda94 <- st_transform(bmk_tr, crs = crs(set_crs)) # Tracks
occ_bmk_gda94 <- st_transform(occ_bmk, crs = crs(set_crs)) # iNaturalist occurrences
occ_bmk_herb_gda94 <- st_transform(occ_bmk_herb, crs = crs(set_crs)) # herbarium occurrences
saveRDS(bmk_tr_gda94, paste0(WKDir,"data_bmk/tracks/tracks_clean.rds"))
#plot(slope_bmk)
```


```{r}
# Transferring via Toblers Hiking function
f_exp <- function(x) {
  ifelse(x > 70, NA, 1/(6 * exp(-3.5 * abs(x/100 + 0.05))) )
}

cost_bmk <- app(slope_bmk, f_exp,
             filename=paste0(WKDir,"data_bmk/cost.tif"),
             overwrite=TRUE)
crs(cost_bmk)

plot(cost_bmk)
```
```{r}

setup_terra_for_large_rasters(
  tempdir = "D:/temp/",
  memfrac = 0.6,
  verbose = TRUE
)

 cost_bmk <- load_cost_raster(paste0(WKDir,"data_bmk/cost.tif"))
 crs(cost_bmk) <- set_crs
 track_bmk <- load_tracks(paste0(WKDir,"data_bmk/tracks/tracks_clean.rds"))
 burn_tracks(cost_bmk, track_bmk, filename=paste0(WKDir,"output_bmk/burn.tif"))
 burn_bmk <- terra::rast(paste0(WKDir,"output_bmk/burn.tif"))

run_cost_dist(burn_bmk, filename= (paste0(WKDir,"output_bmk/cost_surface.tif")), tmp_fn="D:/temp/", overwrite = TRUE, maxiter = 25)

cost_surface <- terra::rast(paste0(WKDir,"output_bmk/cost_surface.tif"))

cost_surface_bmk <-  terra::crop(cost_surface, vect(np_bmk_gda94), mask=TRUE) # run and check
terra::writeRaster(cost_surface_bmk, paste0(WKDir, "output_bmk/cost_surface.tif"), overwrite = TRUE) ## Commented out to prevent re-writing
cost_surface_bmk <- terra::rast(paste0(WKDir, "output_bmk/cost_surface.tif"))
```
```{r}
# combining herb and iNat
occ_bmk_comb <- rbind(occ_bmk_gda94, occ_bmk_herb_gda94)
occ_bmk_comb <- dplyr::bind_rows(list(occ_bmk_gda94, occ_bmk_herb_gda94), .id = 'source') 
occ_bmk_comb <- occ_bmk_comb %>%
    mutate(source = recode(source, "1" = "iNaturalist", "2" = "Herbarium"))

occ_bmk_cost <- pts_cost(occ_bmk_comb, cost_surface_bmk) # point cost
```


```{r}
occ_bmk_cost <- occ_bmk_cost %>% filter(uncertainty < 300) # filtering out points with more than 300m of uncertainty in location
tax_resources <- load_taxonomic_resources() # load this first run of session
status <- native_anywhere_in_australia(as.list(occ_bmk_cost$species), resources = tax_resources) # using APCalign to extract native/introduced status
occ_bmk_cost <- cbind(occ_bmk_cost, status$native_anywhere_in_aus)
```


```{r}
occ_bmk_text <- occ_bmk_cost %>% filter(pts_cost > 300) # creating a subset of labels for plotting

buff <- st_buffer(np_bmk_gda94, dist = 500, nQuadSegs = 30) # 500m buffer for plotting
tr_bmk <- st_intersection(bmk_tr_gda94, buff) 

occ_bmk_cost <- dist_points_to_path(occ_bmk_cost, tr_bmk) # Calculates crow distance from point to the path.

plot_cost(cost_surface=cost_surface_bmk, tr=tr_bmk, occ_cost=occ_bmk_cost, occ_text=occ_bmk_text, cell=10000, fn=paste0(WKDir,"output_bmk/plots/cost_rast_bmk.png"))
```








```{r}
grid_sf <- grid_points_cost(n=2000, np_outline=np_bmk_gda94, tr=tr_bmk, cost_surface=cost_surface_bmk)
```


```{r}
#cost vers dist plots
# iNaturalist
introduced <- occ_bmk_cost %>% filter(status.native_anywhere_in_aus == "introduced")
occ_bmk_cost_inat <- occ_bmk_cost %>% filter(source == "iNaturalist")
cost_v_dist_plot(grid_sf, occ_bmk_cost_inat, extra=TRUE, top_layer_points = introduced, cols=c("#ABC7C9", "#666633", "#669900") , fn = paste0(WKDir,"output_bmk/plots/cost_v_dist_inat.png"))

# Herbarium
occ_bmk_cost_herb <- occ_bmk_cost %>% filter(source == "Herbarium")
cost_v_dist_plot(grid_sf, occ_bmk_cost_herb, extra=FALSE, cols= c("#666633","#669900"), fn=paste0(WKDir,"output_bmk/plots/cost_v_dist_herb.png"))
```
